cells.data:
Understanding the Problem

You have to understand the problem
  • What is the unknown?
  • What are the data?
  • What is the condition?
    • Is it possible to satisfy the condition?
  • Separaate the various parts of the condition
    • Draw them down

Devising a Plan

Find the connection between the data and the unknown. You should obtain eventually a plan to the solution
  • Have you seen it before?
  • Have you seen it in a different form?
  • Do you know a related problem?
  • Do you know a theorem that could be useful
  • Has it been solved somewhere else?
  • Could you restate the problem
  • Solving the problem
    • break it down smaller pieces
    • Keep part of the condition and drop the other part
  • Have you taken into account all essential notions involved in the problem?

Carrying Out the Plan

  • Check each step
  • Can you see clearly that the step is correct?
  • Can you prove that it is correct?

Looking back

Examine the solution obtained
  • Can you check the result?
  • Can you check the argument?
  • Can you derive the result differently?
  • Can you use the result, or the method, for some other problem?
